| Every Georgia Democrat should be cheering: Eric Gisler -- a Democrat who runs a local olive oil shop -- won a special election and flipped a Georgia state House seat that Donald Trump carried by 12 points.
Republicans want you to believe districts like Marjorie Taylor Greene's aren't winnable. They tell us her district is too red, too far gone, too hopeless to contest.
But they said the same thing about districts just like the one Eric Gisler now represents.
[Will you rush a donation to my campaign right now to help me build on this momentum and win MTG's district for Democrats?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Di_MVJtfDCgcR4j8ovA3fjw1-s5Z2UsjFaTSNGSGTiH2yOzeqMQqDBIRg7GQlUNfOUCw_m8chqTEdWx8ki_XV0fHrED5nqVGDWMI3mWQ-CdAbYEX9fI10CnblZ5Yeu4o6WY4Cx2q5H-yzReW09VS1ye2oaiSNPmp8D0EZUnp1mvPX9GFUUYfVhvjw7s8tlsV4uB4amySKycHDyVG13Ao5lYWF92Zf1IW&c=ww_cNI95FqJ94WvrbG9sfaNUq1TKoYhzVRxJ3r7--f2Sv27dCGpDkQ==&ch=V42E7CGJBak9X846y4hW9_HcjhrZT-UgTUsJAiMb8JPs-w9vdHW0Yw==)

| Here's what this win tells us:

* Voters in so-called "deep red" areas are tired of being taken for granted.
* When Democrats actually show up and give people something to vote for, they respond.
* The map is changing -- and our imagination needs to change with it.

I'm in this race because I believe Georgia deserves more than chaos, conspiracy theories, and cruelty. We deserve representatives who care about lowering costs, protecting our freedoms, and actually solving problems -- not chasing cable news hits.
This election result isn't just a feel-good headline. It's a blueprint.
We can organize in places Republicans have written off. We can build real coalitions in communities MTG has ignored. And yes -- we can flip her seat.
[But that only happens if we invest early and build strong. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

But prepare to be SHOCKED.| | | | January 03 | | | | | HORRIBLE News Comes in for US Retirees | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4454a620a6284e87b7318bbbc5a8e8cc&_e=rU_Vuihqg1i9FzrBy6bwyPa2e-ZGmTVcwZbJryDeEnylgKaLwhuN89O5P_NfLouSOLIT3taHTjZ2W2z7JYiu0vyqTh-1Ng6U07fGFXLp-n2_15QCDVn8cpNbiiAsNk2G8JlooY3EdglTJDO-w6P1ZnNI1C3dO5dUrMDK_KFdobvMF6H8dDXSM25QglXQrCN0o7vqH5708u_K2koYXhrRxOMkSM-576Cb2tz7QerrhUK_eqkG1eVn3XbBstQUPfj4XF5FKnpm8JJWH1dnBwhuhsa1Klxk0XTHvPdwMXubnQIw39vxmHCgCxPb-dMIpku-KBFkSxhQMWR4nTglUCytX9NNdygnUyk9UfM6xTaEi-7JXIc5ykAvSbEmi1OeOfrJNj2vTOQ03vxcDGejhXhNN576d5W21tOgEKb9iFD1XgQYwI1mJk7qMA0jlUDHPqnxSbA4_lE59Qx-Imu5FT9RGbrXWwv72PTs3TsV5KFIUDbHAADjeqeve8HlMHIxIBTfnKSxkd11iXQqf82-R4CxVoEFHL-F8-5T5fB40ZL20uvJ3DjvMS53WkUx0cxPjxDTnVeA8mO9A9kcDqtWnbLHwg1A6SVJT-MFAzT-wL784sD0PheJysyjJ12C8DfCF7ZNkGjLUl3RW2EroU6dFC-fyQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4454a620a6284e87b7318bbbc5a8e8cc&_e=rU_Vuihqg1i9FzrBy6bwyPa2e-ZGmTVcwZbJryDeEnylgKaLwhuN89O5P_NfLouSOLIT3taHTjZ2W2z7JYiu0vyqTh-1Ng6U07fGFXLp-n2_15QCDVn8cpNbiiAsNk2G8JlooY3EdglTJDO-w6P1ZnNI1C3dO5dUrMDK_KFdobvMF6H8dDXSM25QglXQrCN0o7vqH5708u_K2koYXhrRxKqn_S_kz4LZeKflCkOiJG4kM4Tmu6q9wUg9o6-2iNqrFPDlRRe2kWGbxLL7_iuFeyilfPEGJvXdA-yztTN_9XlJqzYJtQnMY18osItvvoOoJXRN3KdE0Gy2yPamv4Dy7zTCVY1G6oTORi7gsWs4AqAy1QSBdNtVstmWqAeH8Eziy866dLFSKSIZpzxgqVGOqKJ9B9XiwgBYnIG7oSaMiGlEMipGCakCgiehQrhol7kUJGtSexKlOrzjabdvvFm0CWN3oF8fAx0WcvQUm09pHw5OxNx2NTlLWS3FQwcnEpnS2Fbz4_bz5prRMa2GRkeddQFZM_tOlypv1-ammmbgZV9WCEgqe6UkMbW4UQYfnnfkn1Y694aLiem9qCdnU-5uH7AKo8Ks61qfI6oguRq-WW2BW06tKpIeAaLKdeXfdDGu1XLWdqiJYthoMSvxlal0ow%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Hi Peter,
Only hours after bragging on social media about doctors giving him a third cognitive test in less than a year, Donald Trump launched an illegal invasion of Venezuela and kidnapped their President, Nicolas Maduro. In a speech to the nation this morning, Trump announced the U.S. government is now in control of Venezuela and that US oil companies will be sent to the country to "increase oil production," aka steal their natural resources.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x4QOzbjfau2xgZBC4npEbCJClCFlwCTjGZtrNU4Oj_s9OHhuVOs7sfU35vidIiqbMrLDyiOkne8qyUWqN_qoKj3QGqsB7_zF5c6FkRcLi9heLizmdoDtY31BUob6ujj10eOMt3UEEGqTJkQbiY-MHtCpY9jt1mn5aAFji0U_08pc3x3NGyc2k9bnlmPYTeyw4hpNX-pFdjWrpqVjLCMLNfUbGCsuAX3G&c=DNjc2ZiT-CcypILvhHQeOq1q4r7WEbf4WzI6mgp3ZAp5leQSmGuWeg==&ch=jAKjajVuAakcKIRCL5nMPTxLQz7wkSX_jkwt4sOHmGRPDbvdVsWvJA==)
---

The Trump administration is a criminal enterprise led by a deeply unwell president whose unraveling mind is destroying the reputation of America, inviting violent retribution at home, and endangering us all.
Trump needs to be impeached and removed from office immediately. Our nation cannot endure three more years of this criminal regime.
This is also a consequence of Congress relinquishing its constitutional authority to declare war to the executive branch via laws like the Authorization for Use of Military Force (AUMF), passed shortly after the 9/11 terror attacks.
When I get to Congress, I will join my fellow Democrats in impeachment proceedings. I will also repeal the AUMF that has been used by countless presidents to wage war without Congressional approval. And I will fight to hold the war criminals in Trump's administration accountable. [I am running for Congress on an unapologetically pro-peace platform and will fight against Trump's criminal regime and the military industrial complex tooth-and-nail. In a speech to the nation this morning, Trump announced the U.S. government is now in control of Venezuela and that US oil companies will be sent to the country to "increase oil production," aka steal their natural resources. | == The Trump administration is a criminal enterprise led by a deeply unwell president whose unraveling mind is destroying the reputation of America, inviting violent retribution at home, and endangering us all. Trump needs to be impeached and removed from office immediately. Our nation cannot endure three more years of this criminal regime. This is also a consequence of Congress relinquishing its constitutional authority to declare war to the executive branch via laws like the Authorization for Use of Military Force (AUMF), passed shortly after the 9/11 terror attacks. When I get to Congress, I will join my fellow Democrats in impeachment proceedings. I will also repeal the AUMF that has been used by countless presidents to wage war without Congressional approval. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Happy New Year! A Blueprint for Mississippi in 2026
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/alookahead?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**As we kick off 2026, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy is more energized than ever.** We are excited about the successes our state has seen – and we have a plan to build on that momentum with further free market reform!

For decades, our state lagged behind. Growth was slow and too many young people left our state to seek opportunities elsewhere. That is starting to change.

**Over the past five years, Mississippi has seen more economic growth than in the previous 15 combined. **

Mississippi’s progress is real, but it did not happen by chance. It is happening thanks to free market reform - including major tax cuts, flexible labor laws, affordable energy, and fiscal discipline.

MCPP aims to help build on this in the 2026 legislative session. We have a clear, targeted plan for further free market reforms.

**Here is our focus for the 2026 legislative session which starts this coming week:**

1. **School Choice**

Mississippi has already taken a strong step by assigning every public-school student a personalized education budget. Now is the time to let families truly control it. We are working to see a universal Education Savings Account (ESA) program, modeled on successful reforms like Arkansas’s LEARNS Act.

Other education reforms, such as making it easier for families to move from one public school to another are important, but the key goal must be an ESA system, just like they now have in Arkansas, Tennessee and Alabama.

1. **Repeal of Certificate-of-Need (CON) Laws**

Mississippi’s outdated health regulation regime stifles competition, blocks investment in healthcare and drives up costs - especially in rural areas. We are pushing for a partial repeal of these restrictions across regulated services.

It is also essential that we grant Advanced Practice Registered Nurses full practice authority. These changes could lower healthcare costs significantly, expand rural access, and save millions annually - freeing the market to deliver better, more affordable care.

1. **Conservative Spending **

To enable future tax cuts, and to prevent the public sector crowding out local businesses, we need to see fiscal discipline in this state. The fiscal climate is changing, and the days of large federal subsidies is coming to an end. It is essential that our lawmakers live within our means. That means keeping spending under control and not squandering any surpluses.

These are MCPP’s big three priorities for the coming session – and we will be working closely with key lawmakers and our coalition allies to advance them.

MCPP is also supportive of a number of other reforms up for discussion. For example, we would love to see a restoration of the ballot initiative. With labor-force participation in Mississippi still too low, we would love to see reform in welfare administration to ensure more stringent requirements on able-bodied welfare recipients, and more meaningful sanctions for non-compliance. We would support such changes, but they are not our primary focus for this session.

We are super excited at the start of the 2026 legislative session. Our team will be working hard to ensure real reform – and **I will be sure to keep you personally updated on the progress we make as the session advances!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b0f195d27b&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|

We are excited about the successes our state has seen – and we have a plan to build on that momentum with further free market reform! For decades, our state lagged behind. Growth was slow and too many young people left our state to seek opportunities elsewhere. That is starting to change. Over the past five years, Mississippi has seen more economic growth than in the previous 15 combined. Mississippi’s progress is real, but it did not happen by chance. It is happening thanks to free market reform - including major tax cuts, flexible labor laws, affordable energy, and fiscal discipline. MCPP aims to help build on this in the 2026 legislative session. We have a clear, targeted plan for further free market reforms. Here is our focus for the 2026 legislative session which starts this coming week: 1. School Choice Mississippi has already taken a strong step by assigning every public-school student a personalized education budget. Now is the time to let families truly control it. We are working to see a universal Education Savings Account (ESA) program, modeled on successful reforms like Arkansas’s LEARNS Act. Other education reforms, such as making it easier for families to move from one public school to another are important, but the key goal must be an ESA system, just like they now have in Arkansas, Tennessee and Alabama. 1. Repeal of Certificate-of-Need (CON) Laws Mississippi’s outdated health regulation regime stifles competition, blocks investment in healthcare and drives up costs - especially in rural areas. We are pushing for a partial repeal of these restrictions across regulated services. It is also essential that we grant Advanced Practice Registered Nurses full practice authority. These changes could lower healthcare costs significantly, expand rural access, and save millions annually - freeing the market to deliver better, more affordable care. 1. Conservative Spending To enable future tax cuts, and to prevent the public sector crowding out local businesses, we need to see fiscal discipline in this state. The fiscal climate is changing, and the days of large federal subsidies is coming to an end. It is essential that our lawmakers live within our means. That means keeping spending under control and not squandering any surpluses. These are MCPP’s big three priorities for the coming session – and we will be working closely with key lawmakers and our coalition allies to advance them. MCPP is also supportive of a number of other reforms up for discussion. For example, we would love to see a restoration of the ballot initiative. With labor-force participation in Mississippi still too low, we would love to see reform in welfare administration to ensure more stringent requirements on able-bodied welfare recipients, and more meaningful sanctions for non-compliance. We would support such changes, but they are not our primary focus for this session. We are super excited at the start of the 2026 legislative session. Our team will be working hard to ensure real reform – and I will be sure to keep you personally updated on the progress we make as the session advances! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

**➤➤ URGENT: Trump’s DOJ is waging war on voter privacy** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122575467/592909593/38783915?refcode=em-1.3.26-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzc3YmM5ZC1hZWU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10_Zl4SmdRAOzXg_beO30r9re7J8XXRSvqoY-Sxr3Q8=)
* * *
Friend, There’s been another alarming escalation in the Trump administration’s campaign to seize sensitive election data from states, and it’s a direct attack on voter privacy and state control of elections. The DOJ is suing multiple states to force them to turn over full, unredacted voter rolls – including names, addresses, driver’s license numbers, and partial Social Security numbers. This isn’t routine list maintenance. It’s a sweeping federal power grab, and experts are warning it could be used to justify mass voter purges or build a national surveillance system of eligible voters. States like Colorado, Hawaii, Massachusetts, and Nevada have refused — and now they’re being dragged to court for protecting their voters. We can’t let this become the new normal. Democratic Secretaries of State and election officials are pushing back, but this fight will require resources, organizing, legal support, and public pressure. **[Can you chip in $3 to help support the leaders defending voter privacy and free elections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122575468/592909595/38783915?refcode=em-1.3.26-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzc3YmM5ZC1hZWU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10_Zl4SmdRAOzXg_beO30r9re7J8XXRSvqoY-Sxr3Q8=)** | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122575470/592909596/38783915?refcode=em-1.3.26-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzc3YmM5ZC1hZWU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10_Zl4SmdRAOzXg_beO30r9re7J8XXRSvqoY-Sxr3Q8=)**

name: Rachel Wallace
subject: Thanks for joining our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wallace for Congress
body:
wallaceforcongress.com [wallaceforcongress.com]
Friend,
Just wanted to send you a quick note to say thanks for being part of our campaign.
I said it when we first started — it’s about time our national politics got back to being about our local communities. And that’s what this campaign is all about. But I can’t do it alone.
You’re now part of the team that’s going to take this campaign to every kitchen table, fire company hall, and church basement in this part of Pennsylvania. Together, we can win this thing.
In the weeks ahead, we’ll share volunteer opportunities, events, and ways to make your voice heard. For now, the best way to plug in is to follow along on social, where we post updates and ways to take action.
https://www.facebook.com/wallaceforpa [https://www.facebook.com/wallaceforpa] https://twitter.com/wallaceforpa [https://twitter.com/wallaceforpa] https://instagram.com/wallaceforcongress [https://instagram.com/wallaceforcongress]
Thank you for being part of this. It means more than I can say.
Rachel Wallace
Candidate for PA-09
Paid for by Wallace for Congress
Wallce for Congress
PO Box 15
New Ringgold, PA 17960
United States

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9038588/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTXZmSmJhVmpTUA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDM/LbmNsamtCUzc0RQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUJ0WWtvdWJCQU5scw/gaVknwg/senba0e8b0b)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth — but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn’t about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath.**

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**[And when you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we’ll send you a copy of Charlie’s final book — as our thank you for carrying his legacy forward.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP.**_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that — as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You’ll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would’ve wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you’re not just supporting the movement Charlie built — you’re helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months.**

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---

**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage — _the very things Charlie gave his life for._

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you — just as it led Charlie — to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28693691-9d51-46b0-acd6-026bbc6b4bd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By: Melissa Corrigan**_
_TLDR:_ _Friend of BAM,[Elizabeth Raven](https://open.substack.com/users/402325014-elizabeth-raven?utm_source=mentions), Venezuelan University professor and architect, lives in Caracas and has shared some video and reporting from the region after the US attacked the capital city of Venezuela and allegedly captured President Maduros and his wife. We are amplifying her reporting._
In pre-dawn hours, explosions rocked the city of Caracas as the United States has apparently launched a full offensive assault against the capital city of Venezuela as well as allegedly capturing the sitting President, Nicolas Maduro Moros.1
This attack is an escalation of the ongoing threats to Venezuela by US President Donald Trump, and, if true, the capture of a sitting President from his own capital city would prove to be an escalation of political aggression that would rock diplomatic efforts internationally.
Venezuelan Vice President Delcy Rodriguez has issued a demand for proof of life of Maduro from the United States via a broadcast message.2
Two weeks ago, Melissa Corrigan here at Blue Amp Media convened with [Elizabeth Raven](https://open.substack.com/users/402325014-elizabeth-raven?utm_source=mentions) and [Arturo Dominguez](https://open.substack.com/users/6284790-arturo-dominguez?utm_source=mentions) to discuss getting some first-hand and expert voices on Latin America, and specifically Venezuela, to enlighten and educate our readers on the global sociopolitical history, current events, and ramifications of our government's involvement in the region.
So when the news alert woke us this morning, we flew directly to Substack to check on Elizabeth. Her feed is astonishing. Elizabeth is an educator, and clearly so, as her home city is under assault and she coolly reports and provides information, direct video, and shares other resources for context. If you have not subscribed to her, you're going to want to do that ASAP to get a direct visual on the ground in Caracas.
[| | | Elizabeth Raven 8hBREAKING: I AM LISTENING A PLANE AN DETONATIONS OVER CARACAS, VENEZUELA. @Arturo Dominguez , Some other friends and family report it too. The plane comes and go over the city but I can't see the plane, nor the fire or smoke. There are videos of attacks to several military bases in Caracas, and La Guaira, but I don't now the source so I won't t share them until I know. Nothing to do with drug cartels, as we always...
---
| 32| | 9|
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/profile/402325014-elizabeth-raven/note/c-194574095)
As you can imagine, we are fearful for our friend's safety, but we are so impressed with her documentation of this morning's events and want to make sure her coverage is widely seen.
[| | | Elizabeth Raven 6hOur helicopters and war airplanes are already protecting the zones that were under attack.
---
| 10| | 8|
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/profile/402325014-elizabeth-raven/note/c-194593711)
It appears that strategic drone strikes were carried out throughout the city, including on the final resting place of Hugo Chavez, [Cuartel de la Montaña](https://substack.com/redirect/55ed256c-4cfc-4719-840f-e3c9cbbf1c8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[| | | Elizabeth Raven 7hEsto dicen que es en Caracas, en el Cuartel de la Montaña, donde estan los restos de Chavez :( ¡ESTOY ARRECHÍSIMA! This is where Chavez remains are, it is called "El Cuartel de la Montaña" :(
---
| 4| | 2|
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/profile/402325014-elizabeth-raven/note/c-194586372)
Elizabeth conveys the following official message (translation below) from the Venezuelan government:
[| | | Elizabeth Raven 7hCOMUNICADO REPÚBLICA BOLIVARIANA DE VENEZUELA La Republica Bolivariana de Venezuela rechaza, repudia y denuncia ante la comunidad internacional la gravisima agresion militar perpetrada por el Gobierno actual de los Estados Unidosde America contra territorio y poblacion venezolanos en las localidades civiles y militares de la ciudad de Caracas, capital de la Republica, y los estados Miranda, Aragua y La Guaira. Este...
---
| 8| | 5|
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/profile/402325014-elizabeth-raven/note/c-194585133)
_Translation:_
> The Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela rejects, repudiates, and denounces before the international community the extremely serious military aggression perpetrated by the current Government of the United States of America against Venezuelan territory and population in the civilian and military localities of the city of Caracas, capital of the Republic, and the states of Miranda, Aragua, and La Guaira. This act constitutes a flagrant violation of the Charter of the United Nations, especially Articles 1 and 2, which enshrine respect for sovereignty, the legal equality of States, and the prohibition of the use of force. Such aggression threatens international peace and stability, specifically in Latin America and the Caribbean, and puts the lives of millions of people at serious risk. The objective of this attack is none other than to seize Venezuela's strategic resources, particularly its oil and minerals, in an attempt to forcibly break the nation's political independence. They will not succeed. After more than 200 years of independence, the people and their legitimate government remain steadfast in defending their sovereignty and their inalienable right to decide their own destiny. The attempt to impose a colonial war to destroy the republican form of government and force a "regime change," in alliance with the fascist oligarchy, will fail like all previous attempts. Since 1811, Venezuela has faced and defeated empires. When foreign powers bombarded our coasts in 1902, President Cipriano Castro proclaimed: "The insolent foot of the foreigner has desecrated the sacred soil of the Fatherland." Today, with the spirit of Bolivar, Miranda, and our liberators, the Venezuelan people rise again to defend their independence against imperial aggression. People to the streets The Bolivarian Government calls on all social and political forces in the country to activate mobilization plans and repudiate this imperialist attack. The people of Venezuela and their Bolivarian National Armed Forces, in perfect popular-military-police fusion, are deployed to guarantee sovereignty and peace. Simultaneously, Bolivarian Peace Diplomacy will file the corresponding complaints with the UN Security Council, the Secretary-General of that organization, CELAC, and NAM, demanding condemnation and accountability from the US government. President Nicolas Maduro has ordered all national defense plans to be implemented at the appropriate time and under the appropriate circumstances, in strict accordance with the provisions of the Constitution of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela, the Organic Law on States of Exception, and the Organic Law on National Security. In this regard, President Nicolas Maduro has signed and ordered the implementation of the Decree declaring a state of external commotion throughout the national territory, in order to protect the rights of the population, the full functioning of republican institutions and immediately move to armed struggle. The entire country must take action to defeat this imperialist aggression. Similarly, he has ordered the immediate deployment of the Command for the Integral Defense of the Nation and the Organs of Direction for Integral Defense in all states and municipalities of the country. In strict accordance with Article 51 of the Charter of the United Nations, Venezuela reserves the right to exercise legitimate defense to protect its people, its territory, and its independence. We call on the peoples and governments of Latin America, the Caribbean, and the world to mobilize in active solidarity against this imperial aggression. As Supreme Commander Hugo Chavez Frias pointed out, "in the face of any new difficulties, whatever their magnitude, the response of all patriots... is unity, struggle, battle, and victory."
We will continue to keep you updated on what is unfolding in Venezuela.
Make sure to subscribe to both Blue Amp Media and Elizabeth Raven to continue to get the most up-to-date information, directly from the source.

US Military Launches Offensive Lacking Congressional Authority, Captures Sitting President of Venezuela | | and | Jan 3 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- By: Melissa Corrigan TLDR: Friend of BAM,, Venezuelan University professor and architect, lives in Caracas and has shared some video and reporting from the region after the US attacked the capital city of Venezuela and allegedly captured President Maduros and his wife. We are amplifying her reporting. In pre-dawn hours, explosions rocked the city of Caracas as the United States has apparently launched a full offensive assault against the capital city of Venezuela as well as allegedly capturing the sitting President, Nicolas Maduro Moros.1 This attack is an escalation of the ongoing threats to Venezuela by US President Donald Trump, and, if true, the capture of a sitting President from his own capital city would prove to be an escalation of political aggression that would rock diplomatic efforts internationally. Venezuelan Vice President Delcy Rodriguez has issued a demand for proof of life of Maduro from the United States via a broadcast message.2 Two weeks ago, Melissa Corrigan here at Blue Amp Media convened with and to discuss getting some first-hand and expert voices on Latin America, and specifically Venezuela, to enlighten and educate our readers on the global sociopolitical history, current events, and ramifications of our government's involvement in the region. So when the news alert woke us this morning, we flew directly to Substack to check on Elizabeth. Her feed is astonishing. Elizabeth is an educator, and clearly so, as her home city is under assault and she coolly reports and provides information, direct video, and shares other resources for context. If you have not subscribed to her, you're going to want to do that ASAP to get a direct visual on the ground in Caracas. subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Haley needs a powerful grassroots team by her side, full of people like you.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)

---
Hey null, it’s Sam, Haley’s campaign manager.
**We just set a goal to get 25,000 people to become 2026 Founding Donors of our campaign, and we’re already 68% of the way there.** But we need a big push today to stay on track to reach it. **[Will you chip in?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11277?t=3&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11277?t=4&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)
---
Let me explain why your support is so important.
💸 _In Michigan's last Senate race, the GOP spent ~$80 million to try to buy this seat, and they lost by just 0.34%._ They could spend even more this time around – especially since national Republicans have named Michigan their No. 1 flip target in the country.
🏁 _Polls show Haley statistically TIED with her Trump-backed opponent among independent voters._ That’s one of the many reasons why experts at _The Cook Political Report_ have ranked this race a pure "Toss Up."
🚨 _Senate control will come down to what happens here in Michigan._ _The Hill_ reports that Michigan is one of the Senate seats most likely to flip. If it does, our chances of taking back the Senate go right out the window.
**Haley is a fighter, null. But no one person can win a race this big alone. She needs a powerful grassroots team by her side, full of people like you.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or any amount now to become one of the essential 2026 Founding Donors we need to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11277?t=5&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11278?t=6&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)

| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11277?t=9&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)
---
Thanks for being with us in this fight. Means the world.

Sam
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11285?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11276?t=11&akid=1816%2E49239%2E_7e6XY)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

From sea to shining sea, people are watching. Wondering. Asking the same question in their own way: Do we keep moving forward, or do we let it all slide backward?

That question isn’t abstract. It shows up in Congress every single day.

**_If Democrats flip this seat,_** they don’t just gain another vote. They gain another **roadblock**. Another **obstructionist**. Another reliable “no” vote designed to stall, delay, and dismantle President Trump’s America First mandate.

They’ll _block_ border security.
They’ll _grind_ conservative reforms to a halt.
They’ll do whatever it takes to claw back power, even if it hurts the country.

[**I’m running because I refuse to let that happen.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=be32c3e2082948c1990b95b5d60d3dad&_e=XZZFSk4hLQHEiFmWN6n5ELvqWkdMrxef_hLDbc0vL0yeayjlrmkJaDOttWVPlEWxPEP8psXD_ygLT2CsRTtGgG4BYiy9SXkU_l1pSEstzIl6NKIor3GItu4IdIKVTFgjuuN_s1j3dwHD9FeQNNoWaLH3jagYngy1wCOhd4F7jlmjZPARpvxqcx3CeAnmQmP1-ikbvaF69KddWZH5CLkb5ckBZodZh2m94YEU9jxJ9f-90t6-nrJmMKYvHfe68vbwEJ26YzxrYztriI_fk7mlHyOVP5kVVO6MmkQKgai5NcJZ4nmAtHniFWIvR2UeWLpFpcun0ZoTT8yoGQTj6b2ihsiBY0hJKkOeckxVhOdpY_BWzb1ygmXTPCX4bzRpQ5JHeThFdt062iGdegfC_VH-EwMW1SIyUVw4AgN3_vAYNL9xN7YE1Z6JqGWXbE1vswDD3CRxb6MPdnLOVPwmqx-bzmmAVncofAj7gb6ThHfZu2qcEVmwVK5w5-ihf-BIWW9hsWvs2qGDS89p68XY0lEdSRU_jrUkn8PhYOT7SwdE477FiNpcCxgfrm2blERtTpIWeLBcWZ23ae_vGS8zxdJZn8V2pj5Y-E8iklCVRp6asQPwrH6NkPFxtC-dlLdo6YEh1RT92Cn2a4XdmP5pjWkL299fOxFf3a5xrhIKLtTB3-o%3D)

[**JOIN TEAM LAMB**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=be32c3e2082948c1990b95b5d60d3dad&_e=XZZFSk4hLQHEiFmWN6n5ELvqWkdMrxef_hLDbc0vL0yeayjlrmkJaDOttWVPlEWxPEP8psXD_ygLT2CsRTtGgG4BYiy9SXkU_l1pSEstzIl6NKIor3GItu4IdIKVTFgjuuN_s1j3dwHD9FeQNNoWaLH3jagYngy1wCOhd4F7jlmjZPARpvxqcx3CeAnmQmP1-ikbvaF69KddWZH5CLkb5ckBZodZh2m94YEU9jxJ9f8y_OJT1s4RMhHXgsrGlr_4lqBJaKSjS_In470Z1M3noFvny4u4D_PVm9yIm6k1DBYP7Eo3v2mrHD7LQSnHkpZDClueMn25MnBDLo2pNq2NXBKRdF1PJkkYUSmg-cq_5Wp4SHDp7qZ9aISwC7GjLiPeZxZpt8UUJ7sxMlnMwMh7cd8nZyDflbh-zOq8g85Wl63CA-eFZWYccedLBZ-zuaIxF3-AfEFfyTHRKJTT8L3Fz4-gF65mlamrXF4mu1pOk2r5BqLu3DHGjh5xK1TQySJIymUN6m0F5bpm1RPK8prp0Qb-DVCSD8BSif2oGkuQmgUcH_6UacmSZpzXiNw8Q9uCNEavdFKLJry_-c0zZtLaoWVEAQAk13gOa9uwZim6eUoVR1570MW2oIUi93guB1rI5dYQyAOpY5Z3_Sxeb0giX9mM6RjDiSoRSDOvRSOD5qs%3D)
Our Founding Fathers risked everything to give us a nation rooted in freedom, a beacon of hope for the world. They didn’t play it safe. They didn’t sit on the sidelines.

I won’t either.

The House majority is razor-thin. Every district matters. **This one included.** And the radical left knows it. That’s why they’re already lining up money, operatives, and outside attacks to flip this seat.

What gives me confidence is the support we’re seeing, not just here at home, but from patriots across the country who understand what’s at stake.

I’m grateful for it. Truly.

[**If you’re able to help us hold the line, protect the House majority, and keep Democrats from gaining another seat they’ll use to obstruct everything Americans voted for, I’d appreciate your support today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=be32c3e2082948c1990b95b5d60d3dad&_e=XZZFSk4hLQHEiFmWN6n5ELvqWkdMrxef_hLDbc0vL0yeayjlrmkJaDOttWVPlEWxPEP8psXD_ygLT2CsRTtGgG4BYiy9SXkU_l1pSEstzIl6NKIor3GItu4IdIKVTFgjuuN_s1j3dwHD9FeQNNoWaLH3jagYngy1wCOhd4F7jlmjZPARpvxqcx3CeAnmQmP1-ikbvaF69KddWZH5CLkb5ckBZodZh2m94YEU9jxJ9f9Fu6gA8rmTZ44lQs6M-DTTrx7d11S63BNIRGcxlevjDeKMWeZXJCHIQbwn_QzavJ82Y2jG-mGQcAm3XNIojxnaSZdazM9WGEBh5NAjc5yYmjLfsI_R2yciRdkiwEBZ6Z-3qfgRnOen3Apn9d4JbwLaQuNToCHJZmlH5E1xKtjitVBR9RhNRC2Eai9xzVQUuGBG0t92QGLy57xV2r9N0XHV1Zxk-4pfs0PN38bG3b6VxYOIBULzffypOqCrE5paBD5wegAPX_6-udYIr9WZK_FqOm09vr5Dw466TvDEzhI5h8kx7c4a8Xju7c5ih3O0Kmwai3KZOQh-Ccgc7sbC0KnETA-pxE1VNZJjx1tHxVAF11ZZ-pd-R7IWS71QmmQWN0m-9WO8jm2wz9-u0ET9WVoF_dj26CrNfgcaHEJygzYwK67Sb2qGSBzoTiNtmWvXwto%3D)

This fight is worth it. This country is worth it.

Mark Lamb

name: NDRC
subject: POLL: Americans are ready to fight back against Republican gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
If we all work together, we can keep Donald Trump from dismantling our democracy
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122581681/592926160/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhODNmMmU3LWI0ZTgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KzRtuLxqgYaVfRJBILtlvtVpC9nrnSseFsgsA57kSoc=&emci=f80b9c03-b5e5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=ea83f2e7-b4e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Over the last several months, Donald Trump and the Republicans have led a relentless charge to manipulate congressional maps to grab as many seats as they can. They’ve resorted to staggering levels of corruption, using threats of violence, intimidation, and bribery to try to rig the 2026 midterms. They’re showing us repeatedly that they’re willing to silence the will of the people to hold on to power, something that goes against every tenet of our democracy. _Americans have had enough._ According to a new POLITICO poll, more than two-thirds of Democrats want to proactively fight back against Republicans’ extreme gerrymandering. As NDRC President John Bisognano said, **“We’ve seen an extraordinary public outcry in favor of fighting back against Donald Trump’s overreaches in basically every forum."** **[The NDRC exists for fights like this — and we’re ready to use every tool at our disposal to make sure our elections are fair in 2026 and beyond. But this fight takes resources. Will you step up today with a donation to make sure we can defend our democracy from Republican attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122581687/592926171/1128139581?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AmericansFightBack_email_20260103-NDRC-Tier1-AmericansFightBack_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260103-NDRC-Tier1-AmericansFightBack_&utm_campaign=AmericansFightBack&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhODNmMmU3LWI0ZTgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KzRtuLxqgYaVfRJBILtlvtVpC9nrnSseFsgsA57kSoc=)** An overwhelming majority of Americans still want state maps drawn by independent commissions, not political parties. And that’s our ultimate mission — a truly fair and representative democracy. But we can’t achieve it if we allow Republicans to run rampant in this redistricting crisis. We must preserve our democracy _right now_ so we can pass legislation that would end these mid-decade redraws for good. That means fighting back with responsible, responsive actions, like California’s Proposition 50, which voters resoundingly approved in November, or Missouri’s citizen-driven ballot initiative to reject the gerrymander passed by the state legislature. **[Donald Trump isn’t giving up on his efforts to rig our elections so Republicans can cling to power. clean_body: If we all work together, we can keep Donald Trump from dismantling our democracy | Peter, Over the last several months, Donald Trump and the Republicans have led a relentless charge to manipulate congressional maps to grab as many seats as they can. They’ve resorted to staggering levels of corruption, using threats of violence, intimidation, and bribery to try to rig the 2026 midterms. They’re showing us repeatedly that they’re willing to silence the will of the people to hold on to power, something that goes against every tenet of our democracy. Americans have had enough. According to a new POLITICO poll, more than two-thirds of Democrats want to proactively fight back against Republicans’ extreme gerrymandering. As NDRC President John Bisognano said, “We’ve seen an extraordinary public outcry in favor of fighting back against Donald Trump’s overreaches in basically every forum." = An overwhelming majority of Americans still want state maps drawn by independent commissions, not political parties. And that’s our ultimate mission — a truly fair and representative democracy. But we can’t achieve it if we allow Republicans to run rampant in this redistricting crisis. We must preserve our democracy right now so we can pass legislation that would end these mid-decade redraws for good. That means fighting back with responsible, responsive actions, like California’s Proposition 50, which voters resoundingly approved in November, or Missouri’s citizen-driven ballot initiative to reject the gerrymander passed by the state legislature. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Team NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: We need you today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)
Friend — It’s a new year, which means there are new challenges and important battles ahead for our movement.
We have a lot to get done this year, from winning Ilhan’s primary election in August, to taking back the House majority in November, to doing everything we can to organize a mass movement to oppose Trump’s agenda all year long.
[**So, at such a pivotal moment for the future of our progressive movement and our entire nation, we are asking you to add your name and personally endorse Ilhan Omar today:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-endorse/?source=em260103-1-180&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-endorse/?source=em260103-1-180&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)**
If there was ever a time to show that you have Ilhan’s back, it’s right now.
For over a month, Ilhan, Minneapolis, and Somali-Americans have been under a full-scale attack from Trump and his far-right allies in the administration, in Congress, and in the media.
They are doing everything they can to whip up an anti-immigrant firestorm and put innocent people in danger. They’ve even threatened to expel Ilhan from Congress, denaturalize her as a US citizen, and deport her out of the country.
At the same time, Trump is continuing to carry out his anti-American agenda. He just doubled premiums on average for millions who use ACA plans. He’s kicked millions more off their healthcare plans and food assistance. He continues to use ICE to go after political enemies and terrorize communities. He’s lining the pockets of billionaires who are raising energy prices. And the list goes on.
**That’s why it’s so important that 2026 is the year we deliver a fatal blow to the political dominance of the MAGA movement and send their majority in Congress packing.**
That mission starts with you, Friend, which is why we are humbly asking for your help today.
Every person who signs on to endorse Ilhan helps us send a message that our movement is growing stronger as we head into this all-important election year. It shows that thousands of thousands of regular folks are on our side as we take on MAGA.
So please: [**Add your name to personally endorse Ilhan Omar and join our campaign for dignity, justice, affordability, and a prosperous life for all Americans.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-endorse/?source=em260103-1-180&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-endorse/?source=em260103-1-180&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=2019_791427_3r67kl&akid=2019%2E791427%2E3r67kl)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Touching base
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
In case you forgot
#

Peter, do you remember Jon’s rally in Atlanta last year?
After the 2024 election and Donald Trump’s first actions in office, we were spiraling into a pit of despair and disappointment.
But this movement in Georgia was not going to go quietly. Thousands of Georgians showed up in Atlanta, and the feeling of hope in the room was palpable.
You can watch a clip from the rally here: [**https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mh3_ux9y8yk**](https://act.electjon.com/go/2076?t=1&akid=1378%2E5691347%2EHPebTH)
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/2076?t=2&akid=1378%2E5691347%2EHPebTH)
The road ahead is not going to be easy, Peter. Attacks will come from all angles and MAGA will try every dirty trick in the book to flip Jon’s Senate seat and replace him with a GOP extremist.
_But please, remember the hope from this rally and the significance of this movement._
Together, we will win — _and win big_ — this year.
Jon Ossoff for Senate

👋 Wait! While you’re here... 👋
Jon Ossoff is facing the most important and competitive Senate race in the nation this year. MAGA has already made him their #1 target and will be looking for any vulnerability to attack him and flip this seat red.
**It is very important that we show Trump, our opponents, and the media that our campaign is fired up and ready to start 2026 strong.**
[**Please use this link to give $5 or whatever you can to Jon’s reelection campaign. Thank you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260103-1-subs&t=3&akid=1378%2E5691347%2EHPebTH)

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=1378%2E5691347%2EHPebTH) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1378%2E5691347%2EHPebTH) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99055?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3)
Peter, it’s Governor JB Pritzker.
I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**
**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $10 or more between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots to keep New Hampshire blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99055?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3)**
_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate._ That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.
The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.
This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.
**[If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you split $10 between Chris’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today to help him defend New Hampshire’s seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99055?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99056?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99056?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99056?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99056?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99056?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99056?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99055?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3)
---
I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — **[so thank you for supporting his campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99055?refcode=em20260103-9899&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9899%2E614464%2EoyXXH3)**

JB Pritzker

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: They want to destroy justice. We won’t let them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260103-61036&t=1001&akid=61036%2E1407376%2E1nOfCc ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260103-61036&t=1002&akid=61036%2E1407376%2E1nOfCc ]Demand Justice PAC

The courts aren’t just neutral halls of law — they’re battlegrounds for
the future of our democracy. At Demand Justice, we fight every day to
ensure our judiciary protects the rights of all Americans, not just the
powerful few.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260103.90F5BM&refcode=em20260103-61036&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61036%2E1407376%2E1nOfCc ]If that’s all you need to hear, chip in $5 to Demand
Justice to help keep up the fight.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260103.90F5BM&amount=5&refcode=em20260103-61036&t=1004&akid=61036%2E1407376%2E1nOfCc ]Donate $5 ››

We call out extremist judges who seek to roll back civil rights, undermine
voting rights, and dismantle our judiciary. We hold accountable those
trying to weaponize the courts to advance political agendas. We shine a
light on threats to democracy, and we organize Americans across the
country to speak up, take action, and demand better.

But none of this is possible without our grassroots supporters. Your
support fuels critical research, national campaigns, and community
organizing that keeps the pressure on those who use the courts to silence
voices like yours. Every action amplifies our fight for a fair and just
judiciary.

The far-right has spent decades building toward this moment, stacking our
courts with political ideologues dressed in robes. And right now, the
stakes couldn’t be higher. Courts across the nation are deciding who has
power and who doesn’t. We’re fighting back with all we’ve got and we need
your help to make sure justice prevails.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260103.90F5BM&refcode=em20260103-61036&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1005&akid=61036%2E1407376%2E1nOfCc ]Join us in this fight. Stand with Demand Justice today, and make sure
our courts reflect the values of fairness, equality, and accountability —
not special interests.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260103.90F5BM&amount=5&refcode=em20260103-61036&t=1024&akid=61036%2E1407376%2E1nOfCc ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Demand Justice PAC

# [Yet another war with bipartisan roots](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=183352332&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMzUyMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc0NTY0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDA0ODQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bLJYkfBVKMp_9xRteGhBeZpNpTXi-XZPwQ2ZhgVfzqA)
### Bombing Venezuela would be bad enough without the revolting complicity of the liberal establishment
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Jan 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=183352332&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMzUyMzMyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NzQ1NjQyNSwiZXhwIjoxNzcwMDQ4NDI1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.p_tzgZbSbRL4Cxvue63gl_KXVputYCjGk020jBLtZWg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=183352332&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMzUyMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc0NTY0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDA0ODQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bLJYkfBVKMp_9xRteGhBeZpNpTXi-XZPwQ2ZhgVfzqA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=183352332&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMzUyMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc0NTY0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDA0ODQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bLJYkfBVKMp_9xRteGhBeZpNpTXi-XZPwQ2ZhgVfzqA)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/yet-another-war-with-bipartisan-roots?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

### **Again?!**
Last night's attacks on Venezuela are a perfect reflection of what makes America criminal. They form the latest examples of a longstanding pattern that stretches back decades.
Many critics of Washington will characterize Trump's war on Venezuela as an example of the president's supposedly unique belligerence, an extension of his notoriously [fragile ego](https://substack.com/redirect/e28ea595-4e21-4b57-a029-50959629ce26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They will likely include Democrats concerned about the president's foreign policy objectives and recurring [willingness to violate laws](https://substack.com/redirect/822e1884-6e98-4bc0-b327-526b100f8e83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Those voices will, unfortunately, be ignoring history and reality.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=183352332&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzMzUyMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3Njc0NTY0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDA0ODQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bLJYkfBVKMp_9xRteGhBeZpNpTXi-XZPwQ2ZhgVfzqA)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd61ce57-3c52-4eae-979f-a2fcd47e6ab8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Our country's criminal history is replete with any number of illegal airstrikes, drone attacks, invasions, assassinations, and regime change plots engineered by American "defense" or "intelligence" agencies. Many of these crimes were executed, orchestrated, assisted, or covered up by figures [including](https://substack.com/redirect/cddab067-36ce-48b3-bf13-af37cc9602e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leading Democrats.
Obama's drone strikes in Pakistan and Afghanistan a decade ago [paved](https://substack.com/redirect/325ecb41-322c-42c1-8740-902960f1de64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the path of Trump's arbitrary drone strikes in the Caribbean this year.
Clinton's congressionally [unauthorized](https://substack.com/redirect/58b847a2-aff3-4a97-9c9e-63e54b7102e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) airstrikes on Serbia set a precedent abused by subsequent presidents, including Democrats.
America's war on Venezuela is outrageous, and should confirm for the rest of the world how our country represents the greatest threat to the peace on Earth for which billons of people mouthed prayers over the recent holidays.
Just don't pretend that it's only Trump's fault.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication made possible by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** Paid subscriptions support my work and make it possible for me to write more frequently._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6oF2RV-SkrmgiPHeINUJYQnZUGmtE9uQ5y9XhvV9g2E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=183352332)
### **A poem that woke me up**
My latest poem was prompted by a conversation with a houseguest who visited our home for the holidays. During a chat over the dinner table one night, he asked when I thought the contradictions of the empire would finally force its collapse.
I woke up this morning with the answer I offered that night swimming in my thoughts--just before reading the news about Washington's attacks on Venezuela.
#### **How the cookie crumbles (1/3/26 at 6:30am PT)**
It won't exactly
collapse
until enough
pieces
break off to
force
the rest into
dust
When will the
ship
hit the sand?
When will the
machine
finally grind to a
halt?
What makes anyone
think
that it didn't already
long ago?
Every eviction
conviction
contamination
gentrification
termination
escalation
reflects
entire
worlds
fallen to
ruin
out of
sight
