[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122589443/592946098/-1013392651?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20260103_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFmN2ZhNjAtYmZlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8qMvrlOkSTTpPMSLdQfF9EGDVtLjUfIKEqHcN6_-fs=) Friends, I want to share some news — and be very honest with you about what this moment requires. I’m thrilled to announce that I’ve been asked to serve as the next **Executive Director of the Arizona Democratic Party!** I officially begin this month, but after more than a decade of working in Arizona politics and national Democratic fundraising, I know this much is true: **[How this team shows up will determine how well we can compete in 2026, and we have ground to make up. Can you step up to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122589444/592946099/-1013392651?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20260103_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFmN2ZhNjAtYmZlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8qMvrlOkSTTpPMSLdQfF9EGDVtLjUfIKEqHcN6_-fs=)** I’ve spent my career helping Democratic campaigns and organizations build the financial and organizational muscle they need before Election Day, from serving as Finance Director for the Arizona Democratic Party back in 2018, to running national fundraising for Secretary Julián Castro’s presidential campaign, to most recently leading fundraising for the Democratic Mayors Association, supporting Mayoral races across the country. And right now, I need to be direct with you: **We are behind where we need to be at the beginning of this year.** Arizona is a battleground state. We win by organizing early, investing early, and refusing to fall behind. That’s how we’ve protected statewide offices. That’s how we’ve flipped seats. And that’s how we will do it again, _if we have the resources in place._ Even though I'm just officially starting, I’m asking you to step up now to help us close this gap and kick off 2026 from a position of strength. We have so much work to do. From closing our voter registration gap with Republicans, to building a statewide communications and organizing team, to planning GOTV: **none of it can wait. ** This is the moment where early supporters make the biggest difference. **[Please give to help us start 2026 strong, and please consider making your contribution a monthly gift! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122589445/592946100/-1013392651?recurring=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20260103_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFmN2ZhNjAtYmZlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8qMvrlOkSTTpPMSLdQfF9EGDVtLjUfIKEqHcN6_-fs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your montly recurring donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122589446/592946101/1861397980?express_lane=true&amount=10&recurring=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_VIP_AC_20260103_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFmN2ZhNjAtYmZlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I8qMvrlOkSTTpPMSLdQfF9EGDVtLjUfIKEqHcN6_-fs=)

name: Ken Martin
subject: Venezuela:
body:
---
Derek, Another day, another unconstitutional war from Trump, who thinks the Constitution is a suggestion. Congress has war powers — but Republican cowards are hiding under their desks while Trump orders an unauthorized attack against Venezuela. Trump promised peace, but has delivered chaos. [**The most important thing we can do right now is work to elect more Democrats who will check this administration’s power and prevent more disaster. You can use this link to help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20260103_5679_fr&refcode2=5679_22930333_nhd4Gt&akid=5679%2E22930333%2Enhd4Gt) November can’t come soon enough. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Final Attempt to Reach Peter
body:
Your name is still MISSING from Marsha Blackburn’s final tally.

| | | | **Petition ID: JV839 - Peter**

**Attempt 1: FAILED TO RESPOND**
**Attempt 2: FAILED TO RESPOND**

**Final Attempt: RESPONSE PENDING**

**FINAL CALL: [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwMTAzX0pTLVhMLjExMDExN190MTc4NTg3MS0xMDQzJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDEwM19KUy1YTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3ODU4NzEtMTA0MyJ9/nM9IL5Kg7uaGaKy5Cu1nIg)[Do you support enforcing Voter ID laws in all 50 states?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-sZXpmi1JXwCIKLd1zyCA)**

**\------**

_Peter, I've emailed you TWICE. And I know my team has sent you at least 3 texts about this!_

At the beginning of the year, I began collecting signatures on my petition to enforce voter ID laws in all 50 states. Conservatives across the country stepped up and signed their names to protect our democracy.

But, if I don't receive another 18 signatures before 11:59 PM, I’m afraid we won't have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering schemes once and for all.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | THIS RFK Jr shocker is so outrageous... it could get him impeached: . Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | You might be late to Tesla stock... subject: We want to hear from you →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260103-1789-foote&t=1001&akid=1789%2E342411%2EHq2V3N ]Squad Victory Fund

Hi Peter,

The strength of the Squad Victory Fund comes from this grassroots team —
people like you, at the heart of our progressive movement.

As we move through the beginning of this year, we’re shaping the direction
of our work to defend progressive values and back the Squad — leaders who
fight every day for justice, equity, and our communities.

But to make sure we’re focusing on what matters most to this team, we need
your input.

This movement is powered by people like you. When you share your
priorities, you help guide our strategy and build the momentum we need to
win.

Your voice directly shapes our approach — ensuring that every action we
take is driven by the needs and values of the communities we serve.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2026/?source=em20260103-1789&t=1002&akid=1789%2E342411%2EHq2V3N ]Will you take a moment to complete our 2026 Priorities Survey? It will
only take a few minutes of your time.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2026/?source=em20260103-1789&t=1003&akid=1789%2E342411%2EHq2V3N ]TAKE THE SURVEY

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to the
authoritarianism of the Trump Administration — but they cannot do it
alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/20214?refcode=em20260103-1789&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1789%2E342411%2EHq2V3N ]Please make a contribution today to support the Squad.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1789%2E342411%2EHq2V3N

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Aimee Prudhomme
subject: A look under the hood (and why Tarrant County is our first big test)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240579%2E444211%2EBu3cTD)
Hi,
I wanted to pull back the curtain for a minute. While our voter registration work on college campuses is the heartbeat of Powered by People, it’s only one part of our story. I want to show you the specialized outreach we’re planning right now to reach voters who likely aren’t on a campus, but are just as critical to changing Texas in 2026. **To do that, we have to start early.**
As we speak, we’re launching a pilot program to help Democrat Taylor Rehmet win the close special election runoff in Senate District 9. We’re calling it Vote by Mail & Chase, but at its core, it’s about **making sure no one has to navigate a confusing, often isolating system alone.** We’re testing whether the same one-on-one approach that worked with Gen Z can help voters over 65 who are just trying to make their voices heard.
Here’s how it works.
We know that to win here, we have to stop working in silos. It takes a village, and there is no room for ego when the stakes are this high. Community building is the only way forward. To make that a reality, we’re coordinating closely with statewide partners who handle the heavy lifting of mailing out vote by mail applications. Once those packets arrive, **our volunteers step in to do what we do best: the human person-to-person follow-through.**
In Texas, voting by mail is a maze of strict rules—on purpose and by design. While most organizations mail an application and hope it works out, we plan to stay by the voter’s side through three distinct waves:
* **The Application:** We help 30,000 eligible North Texas voters navigate tricky ID requirements so their applications aren't rejected.
* **The Ballot:** We check back to ensure the ballot arrived and help find the hidden ID flap on the envelope that often causes votes to be disqualified.
* **The Safety Net:** We don’t walk away if a ballot hasn't been accepted near the deadline. We help them track it or find a place to vote in person.

Everything we do at Powered by People is about building bridges. When one of our volunteers helps a neighbor navigate a confusing law, trust develops. **We want every voter to know they have a real person they can text whenever they have a question.**
We’re piloting this in SD9 because if it works here—in a race likely decided by the tiniest of margins—we will take this model statewide. But as much as we lean into the data, **this work is ultimately about the people behind the numbers.**
[**Everything we’re doing is only possible because you choose to be part of this movement. If you believe that real human connection is how we finally flip Texas, please consider making a contribution today.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260103.wcFe2v&refcode=ema20260103-240579&t=3&akid=240579%2E444211%2EBu3cTD)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260103.wcFe2v&refcode=ema20260103-240579&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240579%2E444211%2EBu3cTD)**
**I can't wait to share the results of this pilot with you soon** —thank you for being in this fight with us and for making it all possible.
Onward,
Aimee Prudhomme
Executive Director, Powered by People

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260103-240579-footer&t=23&refcode2=240579_444211_Bu3cTD&akid=240579%2E444211%2EBu3cTD)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=240579%2E444211%2EBu3cTD)

name: Justin Story
subject: Justin Story Congratulates US Military on Capture of Maduro - A Victory for Freedom
body:
Justin Story Congratulates US Military on Capture of Maduro - A Victory for Freedom

| | | | | [|
---](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=3795302a56&e=90ad5fc3c5)
| | | | | |
#### PRESS RELEASE

**Justin Story Congratulates U.S. Military****on Capture of Maduro – A Victory for Freedom**
---
| | As a retired U.S. Marine Corps F/A-18 carrier pilot who has flown combat missions from the decks of our nation’s aircraft carriers, and as the husband of a Venezuelan refugee who fled the horrors of Nicolás Maduro’s regime, I am profoundly grateful and proud today.
Last night’s daring midnight raid under the glow of the full moon – executed with unmatched precision by our elite forces, including Delta Force and the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment – has brought an end to Maduro’s tyrannical rule. Captured and flown out of Venezuela after a large-scale U.S. strike in Caracas, this operation showcases the unparalleled professionalism of our military, the best in the world.
Just one month ago, on December 2, 2025, I issued a statement praising President Trump’s deployment of the USS Gerald R. Ford Strike Group to the Caribbean, predicting that Maduro’s days were numbered. Today, that prediction has come true – a testament to strong leadership and the might of our men and woman in uniform.
To our brave men and women in uniform: Thank you for your flawless execution and for standing as the guardians of freedom. To the Venezuelan people, including my wife’s family and the millions who suffered under socialism: Your voices are heard, your resilience inspires, and a brighter future awaits as the rightfully elected leaders like Edmundo González and María Corina Machado step forward to rebuild.
Here in St. Cloud and across Florida’s 9th District, we celebrate this win for liberty. As your Republican candidate for Congress, I’ll always fight for America First policies that protect our interests and support our allies in the pursuit of freedom.
For more, visit [VoteJustinStory.com](https://votejustinstory.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa75fb334e8c06de90a8e46d5&id=c2a645c4b3&e=90ad5fc3c5) or email [justin@votejustinstory.com](mailto:justin@votejustinstory.com).
---

---

name: Save Public Media via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop the attacks on PBS & NPR!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Trump and MAGA mouthpieces aren’t done yet with their push to completely
wipe out PBS and NPR. And we’re going to stop them.

A conservative group just filed a petition urging the FCC to strip NPR and
PBS stations of their licenses. Their plan: kick trusted local voices off
the air, and hand our public airwaves over to Trump’s cronies.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34915?source=email-20250103&t=1011&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Headline: After NPR and PBS defunding, FCC receives call to take away
station licenses

But it’s not too late to stop them. Congress is negotiating its 2026
budget right now and can restore funding to keep local stations afloat.
But it will only happen if enough of us come together to demand our
representatives save NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34915?source=email-20250103&t=1012&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Add your name now to demand Congress restore public media funding and
protect our free press from Trump’s oligarchs

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34915?source=email-20250103&t=1013&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]ADD YOUR NAME

This new attempt to take away PBS and NPR station licenses isn’t coming
out of nowhere. Trump and his cronies in Congress already slashed $1.1
BILLION in funding for public media and now MAGA is busy trying to claim
these stations have failed to “serve the public interest.”

It’s a lie. For years, NPR and PBS have brought us fact-based news,
world-class documentaries, educational shows for children, and critical
local reporting.

But right now public media is hanging on by a thread as local stations are
forced to close their doors. Arkansas’ statewide public television network
just announced it will end its affiliation with PBS thanks to funding
cuts, saying it cannot afford PBS membership fees.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34915?source=email-20250103&t=1014&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Headline: Arkansas will become first state to end PBS affiliation

Meanwhile, Trump’s busy rubber stamping mega-mergers for his oligarch
media buddies – tightening their grip on what we see, hear, and read. We
CANNOT let Trump and his oligarchs hand our public media over to private
billionaires.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34915?source=email-20250103&t=1015&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Add your name now to demand Congress restore public media funding and
protect the future of NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34915?source=email-20250103&t=1016&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]ADD YOUR NAME

This is bigger than politics. This is about defending the last thread of
non-commercial, community-supported journalism in America from an all-out
assault by the MAGA right. Together, we’re not just defending TV and radio
stations. We’re fighting for the real, trusted news our families, our
neighbors, and our democracy need to survive.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250103.01CluO&t=1008&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250103.9ImxzF&t=1009&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250103.DLGRBm&t=1010&akid=10039%2E5885482%2EHj3dMx ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie wrote this for the soul
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e16964676/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNm00UU1adXdOcQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMDM/LbmNsOVJEU0tqTQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNCNzBJN242Y3g3WXJscw/gaVlSqw/s3h6e243252)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace.**

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**“God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.”**_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans...

...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — _**it’s the message of FAITH!**_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it’s happening._

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we’re witnessing is not just growth —**it’s revival.**

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up.**

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _“We’re not backing down.”_

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith._**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible.

Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy.
---
**For Charlie,**

**Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
**P.S.** When you read **_Stop, in the Name of God,_** you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead.

**[I hope you’ll claim your copy by making your most generous gift to Turning Point USA. Your support fuels our work to build the most faithful generation of Americans in history. Thank you, and God bless!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn’t a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal — the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God’s grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: “God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold.” His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie’s voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie’s hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie’s assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA’s message among young Americans... ...and it’s not just the conservative message as a whole — it’s the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie’s call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it’s happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we’re witnessing is not just growth —it’s revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America’s faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, “We’re not backing down.” This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie’s most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie’s faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I’ll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie’s mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Team Cooper
subject: Short, simple read
body:
We can only beat them if you’re with us.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=246%2E124072%2ELtmScj)
It’s this simple, Peter: | **_[Roy is up against the national GOP fundraising machine and their candidate Michael Whatley, who was excited to rip away our health care, supports an abortion ban without exceptions, and spent years as a Big Oil lobbyist. With your help, Roy can flip this seat blue, and we could even take back the whole Senate, but we need the funds to win — because experts say this could be the first Senate race to cost a billion dollars. Can you help us out with $25 today?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3700?t=7&akid=246%2E124072%2ELtmScj)_**
---
**[PITCH IN $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3700?t=8&akid=246%2E124072%2ELtmScj)**
---
Thanks so much,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Team Pramila
subject: The midterms are just 11 months away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we take back the House, we can put a real check on Trump’s power and start delivering for working people.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260103-5776-footer&t=1&akid=5776%2E420207%2EHomsZ-)
Peter, the midterms are just _11 months away._
And we want to be very clear about what’s at stake: If Republicans keep control of the House, Trump will have a rubber stamp for his authoritarian agenda.
**But if we take it back, we can put a real check on his power and start delivering for working people.**
We have a real opportunity to take back the House this year, but it’s going to take a lot of work. To make it happen, we need to elect more bold, unapologetic progressives who won’t cave to billionaires, corporate lobbyists, or MAGA extremists when it matters most.
That’s exactly why Pramila isn’t just focused on her own re-election. She’s organizing nationwide to build nonviolent resistance to Trump’s agenda and elect more progressives to the House.
But all of that work takes resources — and since Pramila doesn’t take corporate PAC money, we’re counting on people like you to power this moment.
[**If you can, will you chip in today to support Pramila’s campaign and the nationwide organizing work she’s doing to help take back the House?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260103-1.a0yCPn&refcode=em20260103-5776&amount=3&t=2&akid=5776%2E420207%2EHomsZ-)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260103-1.a0yCPn&amount=3&refcode=em20260103-5776&t=21&akid=5776%2E420207%2EHomsZ-)**
**The next 11 months will shape the future of our democracy. We have the power to stop Trump’s authoritarian agenda in its tracks — but only if we organize, mobilize, and invest right now.**
So thank you, Peter, for being part of this fight.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260103-5776-footer&t=22&refcode2=5776_420207_HomsZ-&akid=5776%2E420207%2EHomsZ-)**

body:

---
| You’re invited: Share your priorities for Wisconsin!

**_[Take a moment to fill out David’s issues survey.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fh5ngRe0pehHsRBU4HRQGMYuA4ZF0tPlTjbWEvvkn_agGV-Oasa9CVbPwhGupD-sBIFVviteTNiJTUDTtGoiZlPpBi-r9dJ1ZaGVHe7rqDX8cpWvFk-wMUIYxakEbn9ITgllrye2YeRqzOduAABGp9s76f0b0HHX1pELJMd0P3rwZiK3-hhpQtkIzPjdGsZgU7M-NM2cdGy4rtC7oGAk6tAFktidjU3oIBF_9CU-pCPPDryuGjqcz9ZPIglW3plk/4mz/h3yPDZznSbacL-mujJZ1TQ/h1/h001.D2LDY6ei_9ZVgOiWx1I-7qxm5-UV1obQtxLC8YJa9lQ)_**

[Submit now »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fh5ngRe0pehHsRBU4HRQGMYuA4ZF0tPlTjbWEvvkn_agGV-Oasa9CVbPwhGupD-sBIFVviteTNiJTUDTtGoiZqkXiSQOgyUx8v-f2oQSubSAxEtB-36qEwIB2FaVoAd-P0ru0oxQMRZBKwADpR6Pk3M48TR30YDu_CV9pTs8eaQObtU5m4jWr0FOzwBFjxwIpXK9VR8nk2AVrf8Vka00C3h9y1z00X12PP71LYxJlZdDNmZvdEMRBllt_5oI2EG0/4mz/h3yPDZznSbacL-mujJZ1TQ/h2/h001.tkBdcUm0VS2ZL5b3Hq91pelpmNfzLdh37JIwhMXjueE)
---

Hi Peter,

Wisconsin is a place of incredible potential – but for too long, Republican obstruction in Madison has delayed progress for the communities that need it most.

I’m running for governor to deliver real, measurable improvements in people’s lives: more jobs, affordable housing, accessible healthcare, and fully funded public schools. _Because the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power._ As Governor of Wisconsin I plan to tackle all of these challenges, but first **I want to hear directly from you.**

**_[Please take a moment to share your thoughts on the issues facing Wisconsin. Your responses will help shape our campaign, and the future of Wisconsin for years to come.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fh5ngRe0pehHsRBU4HRQGMYuA4ZF0tPlTjbWEvvkn_agGV-Oasa9CVbPwhGupD-sBIFVviteTNiJTUDTtGoiZxOPP9YWe3SHkj1NL1q9zJ4pmhrhV4ubY83Pik7G922xCDNNdepCUSzyqppHyPotPNM7cqSfSHyHyMsG5c0cr3hzAkofmvW8uIThKaKNlIvZmr83OsHXdpu5lsYPWx3utTscJqCrna2-ZTWQViWAqHCfxv1b5K4LBE3J5dc1gZTs/4mz/h3yPDZznSbacL-mujJZ1TQ/h3/h001.cC2dOpDlW9uWj9ay_5eQMu3lHNKZ4VSInCYnrSJ_t-k)_**

[Share your thoughts »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fh5ngRe0pehHsRBU4HRQGMYuA4ZF0tPlTjbWEvvkn_agGV-Oasa9CVbPwhGupD-sBIFVviteTNiJTUDTtGoiZw9F_ZsDlMivK5AyVGjhsExYVfgzSPx4Q-LbyArD1GHODvYBsMkHTrj_8pa7VOqxIgfSzP_O6V0GnLIMmWWt5m9PTUU_hEzC70cN9pZN9P1gkfIMn6gBuNK9KFUhNgEWFNcCE03EPoFemAP_36R_vfpbRcmEBgqwj-mETN8ixDVo/4mz/h3yPDZznSbacL-mujJZ1TQ/h4/h001.kekUISeaUd28iKL6H-Vz1CkoN3dCLKatS6jUBTQk17A)
Here are just a few of the things that I plan to prioritize as your next Governor:

*  **Jobs and Wages That Build Futures.** I will grow an economy rooted in local ownership and union labor. I’ll take my Building Bridges Program statewide — revitalizing storefronts, activating commercial corridors, and creating jobs block by block. Every infrastructure dollar will support good-paying, local jobs and lift the trades with strong labor standards.
*  **Health Care That Reaches People.** I will expand mobile outreach, addiction treatment access, and EMS innovations across the state — because everyone deserves care that shows up when and where it’s needed. Putting people first, removing barriers and delivering results.
* ️ **Affordable, Attainable Housing Across Wisconsin.** I will build and preserve affordable and attainable housing in rural, urban, and suburban communities alike. I’ll make it easier to get projects approved and ensure new housing is energy-efficient, resilient, and affordable to working families.
*  **Strong Schools and Early Learning.** My education plan includes universal early childhood education, new investments in public schools, and closing the special education reimbursement gap. I’ll ensure that every child has a launchpad to success — whether it’s through college, technical school, apprenticeships, or direct-to-career pathways.

These aren’t slogans; **they’re a blueprint.** Because I believe the government should work for _all_ of us.

clean_body: Please take a moment to share your thoughts | | | You’re invited: Share your priorities for Wisconsin! Hi Peter, Wisconsin is a place of incredible potential – but for too long, Republican obstruction in Madison has delayed progress for the communities that need it most. I’m running for governor to deliver real, measurable improvements in people’s lives: more jobs, affordable housing, accessible healthcare, and fully funded public schools. Because the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. As Governor of Wisconsin I plan to tackle all of these challenges, but first I want to hear directly from you. Here are just a few of the things that I plan to prioritize as your next Governor:  Jobs and Wages That Build Futures. I will grow an economy rooted in local ownership and union labor. I’ll take my Building Bridges Program statewide — revitalizing storefronts, activating commercial corridors, and creating jobs block by block. Every infrastructure dollar will support good-paying, local jobs and lift the trades with strong labor standards.  Health Care That Reaches People. I will expand mobile outreach, addiction treatment access, and EMS innovations across the state — because everyone deserves care that shows up when and where it’s needed. Putting people first, removing barriers and delivering results. ️ Affordable, Attainable Housing Across Wisconsin. I will build and preserve affordable and attainable housing in rural, urban, and suburban communities alike. I’ll make it easier to get projects approved and ensure new housing is energy-efficient, resilient, and affordable to working families.  Strong Schools and Early Learning. My education plan includes universal early childhood education, new investments in public schools, and closing the special education reimbursement gap. I’ll ensure that every child has a launchpad to success — whether it’s through college, technical school, apprenticeships, or direct-to-career pathways. These aren’t slogans; they’re a blueprint. Because I believe the government should work for all of us. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...
body:
In a world that never stops, Charlie did| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=706253b55bd046658aca595e0f1b7bce&_e=2RDGpTsC7qALaYfQC2AgpfOGUE4hSIzz0jN7gQPr3BCCzaZhagnyFykSJKKHpEkpXLiNG0-EgnChQ1PbgHSvnaK4UnHaKIGf9HY5odsETXUAijJ_NqfLtCFSZT57WJeqPXpVTXKyGGFnlGwoj_xGr95U4y0LBl52VxCzpBIF0tA9HPFUfqBw2alH26cqbf2krhXLkcKbfXORKwDnxn2Tdtp0CvSH0VwMVCj9d3ux0LQIiIGmPmBwAqJyGQ-ZPri3O78SqQGGT4JZuXeqJftm8hIxlUaD9vcvethfjeTU9h034VPSvxuPuQFG2DDyeeXKbd87tXxALasjHDtdyZxPf4GRCqxfa9EbG5SaupvX139XmI-oieTb5KaQX9TIH7_Odpgs_QHDD1gK56wIvvNipKdfPH36rpZY3r115NoLYsoq9-d27mz8-h3hq5a-LgyBI_du1YGgvOj8sTi8UcicRYH_k-Hv9dx6nlAq80_XlWcbB3oPrSjoUH8ob-U2CAwNOTSxEayRICiXSfGp8jIfrFVxtq57cQ9T4CpBvUM4sFgaSrYQRh0WRZJMVrE6e-ADqZuFHbGikKEurTPJYH4ke-o6MTeRAWfQHYpIk9GB00v4TMeO1T_zKo98VlUknegPesyWt__ugOuUegKy3q0g8W1C1_Iwzu8SFMeAODxSOwXYs6iJDX3CKTp1vUnlWp1I)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=706253b55bd046658aca595e0f1b7bce&_e=2RDGpTsC7qALaYfQC2AgpfOGUE4hSIzz0jN7gQPr3BCCzaZhagnyFykSJKKHpEkpXLiNG0-EgnChQ1PbgHSvnaK4UnHaKIGf9HY5odsETXUAijJ_NqfLtCFSZT57WJeqPXpVTXKyGGFnlGwoj_xGr95U4y0LBl52VxCzpBIF0tA9HPFUfqBw2alH26cqbf2krhXLkcKbfXORKwDnxn2Tdtp0CvSH0VwMVCj9d3ux0LQl4SR4Ph6hG7SJME-dIQ4XdqoW3yoc_JeUMJdnTFpCuSHPMEsDTdQxCtB4VuIMIsqcUaGgQfwPGprlv66W1aRE6-lOrtiYRjwD6QGDYWIZSeF8RCAvoHUwmDFGJ6fgWCgfLexbphNGMqgGkB8mix5p5NC1kchF39-PWbs912C4BGJIyLq-zyMrXsuJda5sdYePuOTOZoVltt3yt7UdZP0XCqQ0s7HhVtFwEqIqWSrx_bPRE7q43h6BFd2l50iICyNMCS1Q8uyb98-b-GLuGnDal_wzVAlyaaq4prVqCLUrGluCYbxPungQtpMPLJk9Aw_JQLWiZa9iuVXsF4DWURsLnbaBzajJl9adX69B-qWMcS4Ywdxe3ec0tC-lX3SxenixChfqR8O-PlubPNfx1doZJ0-9jewwhZceCsW2mcsQcrovZUbOLtRfbslu3hYAOBsI6JnMkZ2sRGESwfjqK0DG)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=706253b55bd046658aca595e0f1b7bce&_e=2RDGpTsC7qALaYfQC2AgpfOGUE4hSIzz0jN7gQPr3BCCzaZhagnyFykSJKKHpEkpXLiNG0-EgnChQ1PbgHSvnaK4UnHaKIGf9HY5odsETXUAijJ_NqfLtCFSZT57WJeqPXpVTXKyGGFnlGwoj_xGr95U4y0LBl52VxCzpBIF0tA9HPFUfqBw2alH26cqbf2krhXLkcKbfXORKwDnxn2Tdtp0CvSH0VwMVCj9d3ux0LSwZMnF1XjkPG25OshiZa8c8sJtUR3tyT1EmCJ0fhl39rCbRvwOp8v4oCOePRDk1rvLLFhri0TX4zcjnzevj8stwzeMXdtiedinN2wJeL__T_tTFrROmlt5uiNzOkrTsX1NxD5-Wi2FDob5GEqVGGzsQa1DO6UjeGJj7xViPH2GQMnLLEJ8Il_6_-kIzkiE5ztzNoZVrbe1e4kJMLr9wAAJgdf6j78Ptk3QHco8NmSEp8YxP9aHR4be1AmkuwNyV5drPS3d4KVmsGTzvROPYH2LrtCfSVdQb4k24Bx0-tvkscrJciP2FudRuvH5LL4SjWiVZZjIveHEY9Ta7FuekeEe5EiRgWIOYA5x2MQTXoIGGyfFvrHi9eqpB2ymQ1Qe3xY1KbDKw5Ei3_8KTQj6IF81ZidGC6p-iKe6QnLE2m6vOCuwS2Zj8npP6NmlhlfFXBz0v05zAOjYLUn1wHPTb6PR)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=706253b55bd046658aca595e0f1b7bce&_e=2RDGpTsC7qALaYfQC2AgpfOGUE4hSIzz0jN7gQPr3BCCzaZhagnyFykSJKKHpEkpXLiNG0-EgnChQ1PbgHSvnaK4UnHaKIGf9HY5odsETXUAijJ_NqfLtCFSZT57WJeqPXpVTXKyGGFnlGwoj_xGr95U4y0LBl52VxCzpBIF0tA9HPFUfqBw2alH26cqbf2krhXLkcKbfXORKwDnxn2Tdtp0CvSH0VwMVCj9d3ux0LQJ6A9anjcbLW2uUOE-HrRGpychZNQdiS5BXYXZUSd4AbngVjIHQAFm4H21y_yZvqk7gJXiMzhL_42YgqGN8yA0R7ABN6t-9q2yCex2kI2fDoU9cd32OUgl0Vq__Cc98ziXcTVB_Mg_I9SDO8pCXdbW54CwVjF73N7x9qufYL5bqS12pldwK9UW20lUunsoR-JlpcpNuacVfxhcmAQr7lLLqktsRWKII8cQAa0_vHoQf7AsGm87Ff1hUfkUtBAVWsu_QZ0zggAGDZ3ocSBSp-uk_RTL5CiqetgBhxFRoe9EOqpgpDLSBLFO0zTK2vKMtXYxWquAG1Pff9NGs1Wv1G-XHYqf4qln3BwnDAwIisr0oTIyyDTLGl9JfoSNuFAgbGjai9mPt-_CWhgjGdvDb5fcQGto5MhcI-7lEIGAS3ZZUlFxN2d2j3pgTUK12zI5E7O3eEKjQKwZRaG274MA_NsZ)
---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=706253b55bd046658aca595e0f1b7bce&_e=2RDGpTsC7qALaYfQC2AgpfOGUE4hSIzz0jN7gQPr3BCCzaZhagnyFykSJKKHpEkpXLiNG0-EgnChQ1PbgHSvnaK4UnHaKIGf9HY5odsETXUAijJ_NqfLtCFSZT57WJeqPXpVTXKyGGFnlGwoj_xGr95U4y0LBl52VxCzpBIF0tA9HPFUfqBw2alH26cqbf2krhXLkcKbfXORKwDnxn2Tdtp0CvSH0VwMVCj9d3ux0LQD7Ky_q5SgIgIydfoEnK_ErEMdij7_OcDoTQjf8anR4T-eDOZpo3APxWEg-5ocFZ7TGx6OOfZd6TkUUTYrjRSWkmSrfK0OEtmlAPwpKV0j_SxXt2L0fN59A3YPuhvMYhIa1NgWFzZHXHjEV8s6-FsbuQ4TG6eQcuIU-Es6MXpk2E30s_IPTNByP1I6v8fwBCLyI4b7RSwDVRjDSanexu4MX2AK_FuV-U6P5qAGueMqE-fLYa2HM-R5oyADCIgIzU73OCX28GwY3xGmnj5x-lIOf5BytpczmglKJa7f0W3iRFRzsu3Ta1XBT22uP_rjZ8iZOoCwdnRLFYD87xANuM2RBVNBPpyl24dd6asxREGiRcXvBiLUGwB-KOigkxOvsx6oWOfBSLfDpu29WC_DB4HEIogDVWiMjpCqYt37eitIZTSYJ7rBqCgoKODlfJqdo0NB7Mm95NqUAvFZRFngo5pQ)**

clean_body: In a world that never stops, Charlie did| | | | | Patriot, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Dear Friend,
A letter is just so much more personal, don’t you think so?
It’s very rare that I get to deliver good news myself – I am pretty busy these days – but this was something I had to take the time and do personally.
Let me be the very first to congratulate you on earning an invitation to the Trump Platinum Club – you’ve made it into the top 1% of supporters!
You are a cherished member of the America First movement, and I couldn’t imagine facing the challenges of the next three years without you by my side.
Please accept this invitation at your earliest convenience and let’s GET TO WORK!
[ACCEPT TRUMP’S OFFER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**[As soon as you accept your invitiation, my team will ship you a special MAGA New years gift from me Trump to your front doorstep.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump
45th and 47th President of the United States of America

Peter,

During our Medicare town hall, Bernie Sanders put it plainly:

We need a non-MAGA doctor in the Senate.

[ A ]A post from @adamwren: In a healthcare town hall with Michigan Senate
candidate @AbdulElSayed, @BernieSanders says one of the reasons he
endorsed El-Sayed is because he’s a physician, which Senate Democrats
lack.

That’s why he endorsed Abdul, who could become the first non-MAGA doctor
in the entire U.S. Senate, and the only public health official to ever
serve there.

Abdul is a public health expert. He literally wrote the book on Medicare
for All. And he refuses corporate PAC and AIPAC money, because healthcare
decisions should be made by doctors, not donors.

If we want this kind of leadership in the Senate, we have to build it —
starting here.
