name: Shawn Harris
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s resignation has set off a political earthquake.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s resignation has set off a political earthquake.
A special election is coming. The entire country will be watching. And this district — our district — could determine who controls Congress.
I’m Shawn Harris. Democrat. Husband. Father. Retired Brigadier General. Farmer. And I’m running to represent Northwest Georgia with the seriousness, steadiness, and leadership it’s been missing for years.
We need a surge of support before midnight to build the field program, digital operation, and voter outreach plan to win a special election on this timeline. Can you rush in a donation of any amount right away? Anything you give right now will have an immediate impact. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-shawnharris?refcode=260103em-earthquake-rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-shawnharris?refcode=260103em-earthquake-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-shawnharris?refcode=260103em-earthquake-rs]
MTG’s resignation isn’t the end of the disaster she created — not yet. If Republicans hold this seat, they’ll elect another extremist determined to follow her lead. Another conspiracy theorist. Another chaos candidate. Another vote for Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda.
But if we win — if we flip GA-14 — we change the direction of Congress and send a message that the era of chaos is over.
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-shawnharris?refcode=260103em-earthquake-rs]
I’m a fifth-generation farmer and a veteran. I know what service looks like. And I know what leadership looks like. This is our moment to prove that Northwest Georgia is ready for both.
Thank you for standing with me,
Shawn Harris
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-shawnharris?refcode=260103em-earthquake-rs]

# **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

**I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS** , and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t**abandoned me**._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff5c876669424375b80d01bd22d4e7d9&_e=YuJdiBwRH98Tli4LQEu34S7Ua2lgTyGg6VLUXlcVoMOrssza3pXwhwQzvxMn4Ybl3UbNP9WNVofutnDocdeuX-JDgua15QGIfWlbZa-bKgkNPsIOL6p5Km7kJkp9hNhifmFEpFtEIiShy3uo3SBT3SjTEicVBF6OPjPaM9T2VucyiXLO-LhfUwv7mxKjRN7lJVVHyeiGB1iZZxuu0ms4wT14vF9YiS-lRRv3aPYugAKy2NwFyIZyIDMHIhVfdXSd1j5ksUiOf_ZBNtdMxRWMpcgRPuqRKbd0k8tvjZDXxN0SgZoUYkHyLY__uErJC9pvk80Xr4mmKujC2ToP1zpFqFOSbR9LPORYuWM9eg9afoRHJEk2ByBQW3_FVn5Gv9PR0-6biOlDTZHIPfvG-cJ4hmgIG6V32bpPAFt8BiNuWhNzdTs59fItcR208uai34Wz2OYBVnB4zFHukZfvxx_POccGVcdM18PfruSKlsR3Ou7x5RahACek2QC0-OIeCjZIdnEF5UXIDw8V00FJVDP29B3I_IclcIqeiYjKGyj1G_23SpirKD0MkqjIbTlaIZ_-cpnUKv0rFfCMF9tVAZkV5_9Zug55Ecih9tshVQv25yzKXiUfJ8pyuHMSC1BRvc8oqjiWcHPCetH2fiE3JRqQDgqsLX2QhuQeRXFu_SwhY6QDgUPv--dlsvp91ysxUJbm46fIYnXMZJQ2THfkKOYIXXyP_7Rgwwf7smDgVBLa_EI%3D)_**

[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff5c876669424375b80d01bd22d4e7d9&_e=YuJdiBwRH98Tli4LQEu34S7Ua2lgTyGg6VLUXlcVoMOrssza3pXwhwQzvxMn4Ybl3UbNP9WNVofutnDocdeuX-JDgua15QGIfWlbZa-bKgkNPsIOL6p5Km7kJkp9hNhifmFEpFtEIiShy3uo3SBT3SjTEicVBF6OPjPaM9T2VucyiXLO-LhfUwv7mxKjRN7lJVVHyeiGB1iZZxuu0ms4wT14vF9YiS-lRRv3aPYugAKy2NwFyIZyIDMHIhVfdXSd1j5ksUiOf_ZBNtdMxRWMpSmzc8qbF_W8x_Y49R_Vjx0Z_ft9L5VSUSm5CmBKfWGweraURtiCyfvD-_qbkQpPa1W_BDCcy5dg-5p4vjscgMexx-5wJH5YeFkaHY-xiHpVl9DUIW5NTeoDCMjzW-VLhV2kOLO6qvWMhX3l0qZzji7I7wM7qpvvMNYY0RI19XQoIhHxm6XVLSnaWh6_fZjEbKg241kAX6OBa-18NBwQdjMAFfRRL4QtCzuHj34w3LZAs1zBwppr_5GOs4WM0PsTFZVDXDrM22I-zgu51ctLe3reN3xcvpbbXxlMaOnCP5ecE0oKTFXs0lcwo0h20ffpVi61FJYeqZuSvVLZCtnPdKW3_qsJnFloYyJqjVj7tm-s4d6fcEdUV0Sy8B7TpP9Fy-Fa35qqw95HhPNtx8RhPNDDvwyf9BPqJOOxIeeuhDVTH2ELstRC_jdXebakQ2y9Uagz-NwjFfv2JJBHArlDKo4%3D)
**I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you...**
Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you.
I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever.
[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff5c876669424375b80d01bd22d4e7d9&_e=YuJdiBwRH98Tli4LQEu34S7Ua2lgTyGg6VLUXlcVoMOrssza3pXwhwQzvxMn4Ybl3UbNP9WNVofutnDocdeuX-JDgua15QGIfWlbZa-bKgkNPsIOL6p5Km7kJkp9hNhifmFEpFtEIiShy3uo3SBT3SjTEicVBF6OPjPaM9T2VucyiXLO-LhfUwv7mxKjRN7lJVVHyeiGB1iZZxuu0ms4wT14vF9YiS-lRRv3aPYugAKy2NwFyIZyIDMHIhVfdXSd1j5ksUiOf_ZBNtdMxRWMpZGyR-9XNbxspmAfxI6eh8i0JtdKY2pMQgYr15JvuFQI5JMlHodo0QAAT7DFPhf_NyHFQLixYHSu6Sa1jgeEFds9Y0i9t9ynu0yTFxZQqX2jJOQybtDSeUx_v5DGdaosJu2f3Gk888Q1q3864oFdUm1ocaCgiMdu76AYZ3Bi0sAvNE4IQBVzkfEAdLLex-XTfypkaD1YI4S4VbHbUgkZgsvkFd2Bz5bfH70vrsHr2k9vsesmoP6bDTHU3S2r9YXl9o_eGl6cLzjquUaGrNKnkLIBi51itiEAoraTiMzH0JMa3xXPoiiyFbhsVZ1lFybhjz8Am8y_E2B9ZNWmWosDnReCHdHnV5m6fkmDIqcDNHBVSPXmIsgGm2e2lfb3R5_NEUQaJPQI4HNwhlnchZ5jxks_LInZCwMPFXG3YO0vU-XCBr0ZQoJwWp2GfqPtqz86LfY8o7ipUhCWXyXse6ODQC4%3D)

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS , and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’tabandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. name: Voter Action Project
subject: The most meaningful right we have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut:
(Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010326_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010326_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010326_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010326_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010326_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010326_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=010326_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010326_1&amount=35]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=010326_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010326_1&amount=20]

clean_body: We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut: (Image of Richard Blumenthal speaking on the Senate floor) [] RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [] Voter Action Project [] The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks. Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet: (Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [] Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come. Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law. If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). null: RFK Jr. has absolutely no business anywhere near our public health system. Here’s why:
**👉 **He _fired_ the CDC director and replaced key health leaders with anti-vaccine extremists.
💉 He _canceled_ vaccine campaigns and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks as cases surged across the country.
🧬 He _shut_ down critical mRNA vaccine research, halting work on pediatric cancer, HIV, and public health innovation.
😷 He’s _blamed childhood vaccines and prenatal Tylenol for autism_ – even as real experts call his claims junk science.
📉 And his agency laid off hundreds of CDC staffers, crippling our response to the respiratory illness season.
Enough is enough, null.
**This isn’t just incompetence. It’s an attack on our health, our safety, and our future. It’s why Haley Stevens introduced articles of impeachment against him.[_Now, we're calling on 100 respondents from 18326 to let us know what you think. _**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: BREAKING NEWS [VPP]
subject: re: Trump's plan to END vote by mail >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hopefully we’re mistaken...
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS**

We’re reaching out to Democrats who have not added their response to our time-sensitive poll about Trump’s plan to BAN mail-in voting.

**This could completely derail our chances this year!_While Trump tries to RIG the midterms, we need to know where you stand:_**

[**Please confirm your signature is submitted before the deadline: DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)
---
[NO, I AGREE WITH TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)
**⬇️ READ OUR ORIGINAL MESSAGE BELOW ⬇️**
**PLEASE DON’T LOOK AWAY:**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)
→ Donald Trump wants REVENGE on mail-in voting after it handed him a HUGE DEFEAT in 2020.

→ His latest threat is one of the worst attacks on voting rights in HISTORY.

→ **If we don’t show MASSIVE support for vote-by-mail, MILLIONS of Americans risk having their ballots _thrown in the TRASH!!!_**
[**So we need to hear from YOU:
DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)
---
[NO, I AGREE WITH TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20260103_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)
If we don’t receive 5,000 responses by midnight, our momentum to save vote-by-mail will be lost. **Please respond ASAP!**

_The Voter Protection Project_
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=22435%2E878179%2E77_Zlg)

Our team needs to hear from the most active Democrats to help shape our midterm strategy -- and **our records indicate that you are in the TOP ten percent of our supporters.** That's why we want to hear from _you_ first this year.

Last year, Democratic enthusiasm SKYROCKETED as we won numerous special elections and gained critical momentum ahead of the midterms. Now the election year is underway, so we need to turn that energy into action.

Republican megadonors are _already_ flooding key states with _millions_ of dollars, and they'll do whatever it takes to keep a stranglehold on Trump's Senate majority. **To stand a chance of winning _key_ Senate seats, we need TOP members of this team to do their part. Team DSCC

name: Deb
subject: I’m not like most people running for office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Can I share my story with you?

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6569%2E400544%2EqYq2Z7)
---
Friend, I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. **But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.**
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt that someone like me represented them.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
Affordability, education, crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on our state, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.
Thank you for hearing my story, friend. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. If you can, [I’d be grateful if you’d pitch in $5 so we can keep traveling New Mexico to hear from voters and win this race.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3642?amount=5&t=2&akid=6569%2E400544%2EqYq2Z7)
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3326?t=3&akid=6569%2E400544%2EqYq2Z7)
---
Thank you for everything.

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1101?t=4&akid=6569%2E400544%2EqYq2Z7)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=5&akid=6569%2E400544%2EqYq2Z7)
---

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=6&akid=6569%2E400544%2EqYq2Z7)

* * *
_**On January 3, 2026**_ , reports from Caracas confirmed what many around the world feared: the United States launched a full-scale military assault on the capital of Venezuela, with ongoing explosions rocking the city and credible claims that Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and his wife had been captured by U.S. forces.
Our own [Melissa Corrigan, she/her](https://open.substack.com/users/13839118-melissa-corrigan-sheher?utm_source=mentions) was quick to pull together a report from Elizabeth Raven in Caracas, describing the mood on the ground this morning.
## [DIRECT FROM CARACAS: Venezuela Attacked, Maduro Captured](https://substack.com/redirect/db73acc9-b37f-463f-8c0d-4f893b8fff2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Melissa Corrigan, she/her](https://substack.com/profile/13839118-melissa-corrigan-sheher) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/profile/312330913-blue-amp)| | *
---|---|---
| 2:47 PM
[](https://substack.com/redirect/db73acc9-b37f-463f-8c0d-4f893b8fff2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[By: Melissa Corrigan](https://substack.com/redirect/db73acc9-b37f-463f-8c0d-4f893b8fff2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/db73acc9-b37f-463f-8c0d-4f893b8fff2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This development marks a grim inflection point--one that **Blue Amp Media** has been tracking, warning about, and contextualizing long before the missiles flew.
Over months, Blue Amp Media writers, independent journalists, veterans, and connections have published a steady drumbeat of reporting on Venezuela's political conditions, the dubious intelligence narratives being propagated in Washington, the illegal use of military force at sea, and the erosion of both U.S. domestic law and international norms.
What was visible in those stories wasn't luck or hindsight--it was pattern recognition based on actual on-the-ground developments, policy decisions, and intelligence manipulation.
That history matters because what took place today was not spontaneous. It was not unpredictable. It was the culmination of rhetoric, misinformation, legal bungling, and executive adventurism that BAM's reporting unpacked in real time.
But neither does predictability excuse it: **what is happening now is a criminal, unconstitutional act of aggression that should prompt immediate legal scrutiny and, at a minimum, a Congressional declaration of war --which, as of this writing, has **_**not**_**occurred.**
* * *
Blue Amp Media amplifies voices--including yours. Subscribe for free.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.43lMdfcvAVzfzKjrs4y61t53vFicrJ6erLLsnkXhzx8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=183391337)
* * *
At BAM, we've taken a clear position on this entire debacle:
* **We have consistently documented how questionable intelligence and political narratives were used to justify escalation** , long before any military strikes occurred.
* **We have exposed unlawful military actions** , particularly the so-called "boat strikes," which occurred without lawful authorization and resulted in loss of life and destroyed evidence.
* **We broke the story on #DeleteGate** , as Melissa Corrigan documented the confusion and illegality surrounding the orders to delete evidence of sailors picked up during the boat strikes.
* **We have emphasized the absence of Congressional authorization** , underscoring a fundamental constitutional issue: the executive branch does not have the power to initiate war without Congress.
* **We have elevated voices from within Venezuela and independent observers** , ensuring that reporting on the region was not just U.S. official narrative regurgitation.

These themes didn't just emerge recently -- they were threads woven through dozens of BAM reports and analyses in recent months.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/edd8b275-0a8a-4b21-8c2b-23e0885a56ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These are the key Blue Amp Media articles that documented the road to today's U.S. invasion of Venezuela--_before_ the bombs fell, _before_ the narrative hardened, and _before_ accountability vanished.
This article from Jonathan Larsen traces how intelligence about Venezuela was sourced, filtered, and delivered directly into the political machinery surrounding Donald Trump. It shows how escalation toward war began not with verified threat assessments, but with **politicized intelligence and internal messaging** , laying the groundwork for reckless decision-making.
## [Is Jan 6 Happening Again -- In Venezuela? The Alarming Trump Plot You're Not Hearing About](https://substack.com/redirect/f6ae124d-3838-4eaf-b33e-659d83397017?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

BAM's Melissa Corrigan obtained and reported on evidence that the U.S. Navy deleted video footage showing survivors of a maritime strike connected to Venezuela. This is direct evidence of **unlawful use of force followed by evidence destruction** , crossing from policy failure into potential war crimes territory--_before_ any formal war was acknowledged.

David Shuster is joined by investigative reporter Jonathan Larsen](https://substack.com/redirect/75e65d2e-b2f1-4f38-95b8-78bcb8bf2c0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---](https://substack.com/redirect/75e65d2e-b2f1-4f38-95b8-78bcb8bf2c0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
For months, Blue Amp Media documented--step by step--how the United States was sliding toward open war with Venezuela: politicized intelligence shaping presidential decision-making, unlawful naval strikes with survivors deliberately erased from the record, wounded detainees disappearing into legal black holes, and a Defense Department engaged in systematic evidence suppression.
None of this was hidden, sudden, or unforeseeable. It was visible in real time, reported carefully, and warned about repeatedly. That predictability does not mitigate the crime; it compounds it.
Most urgently, **Congress must act.** The Constitution vests the power to declare war in the legislative branch--not the president alone. To allow a war of this scale to proceed without debate, oversight, and authorization is to permit the unraveling of basic constitutional safeguards.
History will judge not only those who launched this war, but those who failed to stop it. Blue Amp Media's Venezuela coverage was a record of what was happening, why it mattered, and how it led here. Now, the reckoning begins.

Over months, Blue Amp Media writers, independent journalists, veterans, and connections have published a steady drumbeat of reporting on Venezuela's political conditions, the dubious intelligence narratives being propagated in Washington, the illegal use of military force at sea, and the erosion of both U.S. domestic law and international norms. What was visible in those stories wasn't luck or hindsight--it was pattern recognition based on actual on-the-ground developments, policy decisions, and intelligence manipulation. Patriot, The assassin’s bullet that nearly took my father’s life... the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk... Those moments changed me _forever._ **Because the opposition showed us exactly who they are.** They don’t want to debate. They want to destroy. They don’t want to talk. They want us gone. **That’s why I wrote my new book — _Under Siege: My Family’s Fight to Save Our Nation_ — to tell the story of what it takes to stare evil in the face... and WIN.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **Support Turning Point Action &
** **Claim Your Copy of “Under Siege”**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it’s more relevant than ever. This isn’t a campaign memoir. It’s about what happens when your family is hunted — and how FAITH, COURAGE, and PATRIOTISM keep you standing. When I watched that rally in Butler, Pennsylvania — my son and daughter on my lap — and saw my dad drop behind the podium, I thought __ he was gone. **When he stood up —**** _blood on his face, fist in the air_****— something changed in America.** We saw courage. We saw real leadership. And millions of people realized: _Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation._ **Patriot, that moment — and Charlie’s sacrifice — have ignited a true “turning point” for America:** 🇺🇸 Millions of Americans are rejecting Leftist lies
🇺🇸 Young people are choosing FAITH and FREEDOM over fear
🇺🇸 Students are rising up and loving their country again But we can’t slow down now. Not when the Left is still trying to silence every one of us. **[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with Turning Point Action — and I’ll send you a hardback copy of Under Siege as my personal thanks for your gift of $50 or more today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point Action &
** **Claim Your Copy of “Under Siege”** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Charlie Kirk’s courage is an example to us all. So was his patriotism. His voice will become millions of voices. _And I’m proud to be one of them._ With your help — this movement will never be silenced.
---
**For Charlie & America,** **Eric Trump**
On behalf of Turning Point Action
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

But evil doesn’t win when patriots stand together. **[Make your gift of $50 or more right now to Turning Point Action, and I’ll send you Under Siege: My Family’s Fight to Save Our Nation — a story of faith, courage, and America’s fight to rise again.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
